description: Write a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/generate_report.py to generate a seismic activity report from the local SeisComP database (mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp). The script must query all Event objects, resolving the PreferredOrigin (time, latitude, longitude, depth) and PreferredMagnitude (magnitude value) for each event, and output a Markdown report to /home/ga/Documents/seismicity_report.md. The report must feature a Markdown table with columns in this order: Time, EventID, Lat, Lon, Depth, Mag (e.g., | 2024-01-01T12:00:00 | 2024abcd | 37.5 | 137.2 | 10.0 | 7.5 |). The environment is configured with the seiscomp python module in the PYTHONPATH.
